name: shopping-cli Plugin
description: Lightweight OpenClaw native bridge for shopping-cli consultation tools.

projectRoot.description: Absolute path to a shopping-cli skill checkout. Defaults to SHOPPING_ROOT, ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/shopping, or ~/.hermes/skills/commerce/shopping.

dbPath.description: Optional local shopping-cli SQLite database path. Defaults to SHOPPING_DB or ~/.local/share/shopping-cli/shopping-cli.sqlite.
